Zod .refine / .transform inventory (claude-code/src/tools) — Go must mirror behavior beyond JSON Schema.

AskUserQuestionTool/AskUserQuestionTool.tsx
  - .refine(UNIQUENESS_REFINE): question strings unique; option labels unique per question.
  - Go: goc/internal/toolrefine.ValidateAskUserQuestionUniqueness (wired after JSON Schema in toolinput + toolexecution).

AgentTool/loadAgentsDir.ts
  - .transform on model string (inherit normalization). Not on main Agent tool wire input_schema for Messages API; revisit if Go validates agent frontmatter separately.

Other tools: grep ".refine(" under src/tools periodically when adding parity fixtures.
